$comment: v4 — adds top-level $comment (documenting invented numbers) and beastHouses (Ghal's Kennel: beast sleeping/feeding capacity, the beast-side mirror of houses).

godId.description: god-* id, or 'neutral' for the tier-0 set

blocks.description: if true, gets a physics collision body — blocks the player and beasts

useDetection.description: sim condition that counts as 'in use' (favor trickles only then)

favorTrickle.description: favor/sim-hour while in use; 0 for pure structure

kinderAlternative.description: the slower, kind path this work shortcuts (design law: must exist)

recipeSource.description: the corrupt origin of the recipe

testimony.description: how NPCs react to its presence

sanctum.description: marks this work as a god's Altar — relic display + Offertory (the Sanctum, WORLD-SPEC)

houses.description: villager sleeping capacity — at night they go inside for rest and safety

beastHouses.description: tamed-beast capacity (Ghal's Kennel and its B2/B3 growth) — beasts kenneled here get fed from stores at dawn

respawn.description: a personal shelter — pitched anywhere, no village or ring required (the tent)

restPoint.description: you can bind your respawn here with [E] (tents, the hearth); on death you wake at your chosen one

purpose.description: plain one-line function shown in menus (what it DOES), distinct from flavor text
